title: Red Crosshair
body:
Makes the vanilla crosshair red. FYI, this is one of 8 crosshair packs I have made.                                      
                                                                                                                          
---

**Installation:**
1. Locate your `.minecraft` folder (inside `%appdata%`).  
2. Open the `resourcepacks` folder.  
3. Download this pack and place it inside the folder.  
4. Open Minecraft and activate it from the Resource Packs menu.  
5. Enjoy!  

---
